label: Main button
description: Defines a bottom-bar tab button in the RimWorld UI. Controls which tab window opens, the sort order, the default hotkey, and visibility conditions.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: MainButtonWorker subclass that drives visibility, disabled state, and click behavior for this button.

tabWindowClass.label: Tab window class
tabWindowClass.description: MainTabWindow subclass that is opened when this button is clicked. Omit for buttons that do not open a tab window (e.g. world view toggle).

buttonVisible.label: Button visible
buttonVisible.description: If false, this button is always hidden regardless of other conditions.

order.label: Order
order.description: Sort position of this button in the bottom bar. Lower values appear first (further left).

defaultHotKey.label: Default hot key
defaultHotKey.description: Unity KeyCode used as the default hotkey for this button. A KeyBindingDef named MainTab_<defName> is generated at runtime from this value. Use None for no default hotkey.

canBeTutorDenied.label: Can be tutor denied
canBeTutorDenied.description: If true, the tutorial system can block this button from being clicked during scripted tutorial sequences.

validWithoutMap.label: Valid without map
validWithoutMap.description: If true, this button is not disabled when no map is loaded (e.g. at the main menu or during world travel).

minimized.label: Minimized
minimized.description: If true, this button starts in a minimized state, showing only its icon without a label.

iconPath.label: Icon path
iconPath.description: Content path to the texture used as this button's icon when the button is in minimized state.

closesWorldView.label: Closes world view
closesWorldView.description: If true, clicking this button while the world view is open will close the world view and return to the map.

validWithClassicIdeo.label: Valid with classic ideo
validWithClassicIdeo.description: If false, this button is hidden when Ideology is active and classic mode is enabled.

basic-tab.label: Basic tab
basic-tab.description: A tab button that opens a tab window, with a sort order and optional description.

icon-tab.label: Icon tab
icon-tab.description: A tab button that shows an icon when minimized, with sort order and visibility settings.
